'''âk-g-y''' ('''kagaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cybervictimize|cybervictimize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cybervictimize|cybervictimize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-g-y
|-
! Lemma
| kagaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kagayithi|kagayithi]] || [[word:kagayiji|kagayiji]] || [[word:kagayishi|kagayishi]] || [[word:kagayi|kagayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kagayuthuth|kagayuthuth]] || [[word:kagayujuj|kagayujuj]] || [[word:kagayushush|kagayushush]] || [[word:kagay|kagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kagayuthu|kagayuthu]] || [[word:kagayuju|kagayuju]] || [[word:kagayushu|kagayushu]] || [[word:kagayu|kagayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagayufuth|kagayufuth]] || [[word:kagayufuj|kagayufuj]] || [[word:kagayufush|kagayufush]] || [[word:kagayuf|kagayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kagayethe|kagayethe]] || [[word:kagayeje|kagayeje]] || [[word:kagayeshe|kagayeshe]] || [[word:kagaye|kagaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kagayothoth|kagayothoth]] || [[word:kagayojoj|kagayojoj]] || [[word:kagayoshosh|kagayoshosh]] || [[word:kagay|kagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kagayotho|kagayotho]] || [[word:kagayojo|kagayojo]] || [[word:kagayosho|kagayosho]] || [[word:kagayo|kagayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagayofoth|kagayofoth]] || [[word:kagayofoj|kagayofoj]] || [[word:kagayofosh|kagayofosh]] || [[word:kagayof|kagayof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kagayĂŻfĂŻf|kagayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻfĂŻf|kagayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻfĂŻf|kagayĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻfĂŻf|kagayĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]] || [[word:kagayĂŻf|kagayĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kagayĂŠthĂŠ|kagayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kagayĂŠjĂŠ|kagayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kagayĂŠshĂŠ|kagayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kagayĂŠ|kagayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kagayathath|kagayathath]] || [[word:kagayajaj|kagayajaj]] || [[word:kagayashash|kagayashash]] || [[word:kagay|kagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kagayatha|kagayatha]] || [[word:kagayaja|kagayaja]] || [[word:kagayasha|kagayasha]] || [[word:kagaya|kagaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagayafath|kagayafath]] || [[word:kagayafaj|kagayafaj]] || [[word:kagayafash|kagayafash]] || [[word:kagayaf|kagayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kagayasha|kagayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokagayasha|gokagayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikagayasha|gokikagayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kagaynĂŒsha|kagaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokagaynknĂŒsha|gokagaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikagaynĂŒsha|gokikagaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kagayshĂ«sha|kagayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokagaynkshĂ«sha|gokagaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikagayshĂ«sha|gokikagayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kagayrosha|kagayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokagaynkrosha|gokagaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikagayrosha|gokikagayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kagaymusha|kagaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokagaynkmusha|gokagaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagaymusha|gokikagaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kagaysherasha|kagaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokagaynksherasha|gokagaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikagaysherasha|gokikagaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kagayngasha|kagayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokagaynkngasha|gokagaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikagayngasha|gokikagayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kagayyasha|kagayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokagaynkyasha|gokagaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikagayyasha|gokikagayyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kagayyamasha|kagayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokagaynkyamasha|gokagaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikagayyamasha|gokikagayyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kagaynĂŒshĂ«sha|kagaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokagaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokagaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikagaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikagaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kagaynĂŒrosha|kagaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokagaynknĂŒrosha|gokagaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikagaynĂŒrosha|gokikagaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagaynĂŒmusha|kagaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokagaynknĂŒmusha|gokagaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagaynĂŒmusha|gokikagaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kagayshĂ«nĂŒsha|kagayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokagaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokagaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikagayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikagayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kagayshĂ«rosha|kagayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokagaynkshĂ«rosha|gokagaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikagayshĂ«rosha|gokikagayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagayshĂ«musha|kagayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokagaynkshĂ«musha|gokagaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagayshĂ«musha|gokikagayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kagayronĂŒsha|kagayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokagaynkronĂŒsha|gokagaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikagayronĂŒsha|gokikagayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kagayroshĂ«sha|kagayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokagaynkroshĂ«sha|gokagaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikagayroshĂ«sha|gokikagayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kagayromusha|kagayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokagaynkromusha|gokagaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikagayromusha|gokikagayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kagaymunĂŒsha|kagaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokagaynkmunĂŒsha|gokagaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikagaymunĂŒsha|gokikagaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kagaymushĂ«sha|kagaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokagaynkmushĂ«sha|gokagaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikagaymushĂ«sha|gokikagaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kagaymurosha|kagaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokagaynkmurosha|gokagaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikagaymurosha|gokikagaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kagay|kagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠgĂŠy|kĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokagay|hokagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠgĂŠy|hokĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokagay|hohokagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠgĂŠy|hohokĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkagay|nĂŒkagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠgĂŠy|nĂŒkĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkagay|nĂŒnĂŒkagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠgĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkagay|nĂŻkagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠgĂŠy|nĂŻkĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkagay|nĂŻnĂŻkagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠgĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukagay|lukagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠgĂŠy|lukĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukagay|lulukagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠgĂŠy|lulukĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likagay|likagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠgĂŠy|likĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikagay|lilikagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠgĂŠy|lilikĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokagay|kokagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠgĂŠy|kokĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokagay|kokokagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠgĂŠy|kokokĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekagay|kekagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠgĂŠy|kekĂŠgĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekagay|kekekagay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠgĂŠy|kekekĂŠgĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
